name: team_task_complete
description: Mark a task as completed and store the results. Use this when you have successfully finished working on a claimed task. Include results, outputs, and any relevant information for team coordination. Team context is automatically inferred from the agent's team membership.

task_id.description: ID of the task being completed

completion_status.description: Final status of the task completion

results.description: Results, outputs, or deliverables produced by completing this task

completion_notes.description: Detailed notes about what was accomplished, any issues encountered, or next steps

actual_duration.description: Actual time spent on the task (e.g., '45 minutes', '2.5 hours')

identifier.description: Identifier for the artifact (e.g., PR number, issue number, file path)

url.description: URL to access the artifact if applicable

artifacts_created.description: List of artifacts, deliverables, or outputs created during task execution

follow_up_tasks.description: Any follow-up tasks that should be created as a result of completing this task

parameters.completion_notes: Successfully analyzed all 25 open issues. Identified 8 high-priority items requiring immediate attention. Found recurring patterns in authentication and performance areas.

artifacts_created.description: Detailed analysis report of GitHub issues

follow_up_tasks.title: Address high-priority authentication issues
follow_up_tasks.description: Fix the 3 critical authentication bugs identified in the analysis

parameters.completion_notes: Unable to access the repository due to API rate limiting. Need to wait for reset or use different credentials.
